title: Synthetic - Email + phone + Israeli national ID
input:
Please update my profile. My contact details are:
email: yossi.cohen@example.com
mobile: +972-50-555-0142
national ID: 000000018
Confirm when the change is applied.
expectedBehavior: Redact each PII span with a reversible token before forwarding to the LLM.

title: Synthetic - Multiple PII in mixed-format prose
description: Several individuals, several PII categories, mixed locales
input:
Hi, I'm reaching out because Shira (shira+work@example.co.il,
052-555-0199) asked me to share my contact:
shaul.barak@example.com, phone 03-555-0184.
Her ID is 123456782, mine is 987654321.
expectedBehavior: Redact each PII span with a reversible token before forwarding to the LLM.

title: Synthetic - PII embedded in structured payload
description: JSON payload with PII fields that must be redacted in-place
expectedBehavior: Redact each PII span with a reversible token before forwarding to the LLM.
